get.description: This endpoint returns only basic information to display to the user to begin the payment flow.

post.description: This endpoint confirms a payment and submits it to the blockchain for processing.

parameters.name: maxPollMs
parameters.description: Maximum time to long-poll for payment status, in milliseconds.

post.description: This endpoint fetches an action for a payment.
This endpoint takes a list of accounts and returns a list of options that can be used to complete the payment.

parameters.name: includePaymentInfo
parameters.description: Whether to include payment information in the response

get.description:
Retrieves the status of a payment by its ID. Returns a polling delay to wait
before checking the status again.

parameters.name: maxPollMs
parameters.description: Maximum time to long-poll for payment status, in milliseconds.

post.description: Creates a new payment with the provided payment details.

parameters.name: WCP-Version
parameters.description: Optional WalletConnect Pay API version override. If omitted, the partner's pinned version is used.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Filter by [CAIP-19](https://standards.chainagnostic.org/CAIPs/caip-19) asset identifier. Comma-separated for multiple.

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Filter by [CAIP-2](https://standards.chainagnostic.org/CAIPs/caip-2) chain ID. Comma-separated for multiple.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor — use the value from `nextCursor` in the previous response.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Filter by payment status. Accepts a single value or multiple repeated params:

- Single: `?status=succeeded`
- Multiple: `?status=succeeded&status=processing`

parameters.name: merchantId
parameters.description:
Filter by merchant ID. Accepts a single value or multiple repeated params:

- Single: `?merchantId=acme-store-1`
- Multiple: `?merchantId=acme-store-1&merchantId=widget_co`

WCP-Version.description: WalletConnect Pay API version resolved for this request.

400.description: Bad request — invalid parameters or API version

issues.description: Field-level validation issues (present on validation errors)

api_version_downgrade.summary: Requested API version is older than the partner pin

value.message: Requested API version is older than the partner pin

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid partner API key

502.description: Bad gateway — upstream service returned an error

account.description: The account to use for the option

actions.description: Actions required to complete the option

oneOf.description: Per-option IC data collection info. Present when this option's account requires data collection, null otherwise.

etaS.description: Estimated time to complete the option, in seconds

expiresAt.description:
Unix timestamp (seconds) after which this quote is stale and confirm_payment
will reject it with `quote_expired`. The wallet should re-fetch options before
this deadline. `None` for direct-currency options that don't involve a rate.

id.description: ID of the option to be used to refer to it in other requests. May be up to 2^16 characters.

PaymentStatus.description:
Payment status representing the lifecycle of a payment.

Payments progress through these states from creation to terminal status.
Some states are specific to the payment source (pull vs push).

String.description:
Represents a currency/token unit for payment amounts.

Can be either:
- A fiat currency (ISO 4217): `"iso4217/USD"`, `"iso4217/EUR"`
- A blockchain token (CAIP-19): `"caip19/eip155:1/erc20:0x..."`

issues.description: Field-level validation issues (present on validation errors)

value.description: Amount in minor units for the fiat currency
Amount in minor units for the token asset

referenceId.description: Idempotency / reference ID provided at payment creation

isTerminal.description: Whether the payment has reached a final state

accountCaip10.description: Buyer address as a [CAIP-10](https://standards.chainagnostic.org/CAIPs/caip-10) account ID

fees.description: Fee breakdown derived from payment option data. Omitted when total fee data is unavailable.

percentage.description: Percentage fee component as a decimal percentage string, not a ratio. For example, "0.4" means 0.4%.

settlement.description: Settlement details. Omitted when settlement details cannot be reported yet. When present, `settled` is always included. When `settled` is `false`, no additional settlement fields are returned. When `settled` is `true`, `amount` and `txHash` are always included.

amount.description: Net settlement amount after fees in the settlement unit.

settledAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp, present only when `settlement.settled` is `true`

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page, or null if no more results

amount.description: Revenue amount in currency's standard unit

ApiKey.name: Api-Key
ApiKey.description: Private API key for wallet authentication

AppId.name: App-Id
AppId.description: Public App ID for wallet authentication. When using this auth mode, the Client-Id header is also required.

apiKeyLegacy.name: X-Api-Key
apiKeyLegacy.description: **Deprecated.** Legacy service API key for path-based routes. `Api-Key` header is also accepted for backward compatibility.
